items.question: How do I know if this works for me?
items.answer: Nello One was created for anyone who wants emotional clarity and self-knowledge. If you want to understand your patterns and improve your choices, it will work for you.

items.question: Do I need to understand psychology?
items.answer: No. The system translates everything simply, in clear and practical language.

items.question: How is Nello One different from other tests?
items.answer: It combines 7 different methodologies and integrates all results into a unique map. The result is a complete vision that shows who you are, not just an isolated label.

items.question: How long does it take to complete?
items.answer: Each test takes 5 to 15 minutes. You can do it at your own pace, one per day or all at once.

items.question: What is the Essence Code?
items.answer: It's the final report that integrates all your results. It shows your patterns, strengths and paths of growth in a clear synthesis.

faq_strategic.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq_strategic.subtitle: Understand why the Identity Journey is different from any other test

items.question: Is this a psychological test or clinical diagnosis?
items.answer: No. Nello Identity is a self-knowledge journey based on models widely used in human development. It offers clarity and structured reflection, but has no clinical purpose and does not replace professional psychological evaluation.

items.question: Why can't I buy just one of the maps separately?
items.answer: The Identity Journey was designed as an integrated 7-step process. Each map (Enneagram, DISC, Temperaments, Multiple Intelligences, Nello 16, Archetypes and Affective Connection Styles) reveals a different layer of your personality. When you buy just one isolated map, you lose the synergy between them. The Essence Code is precisely the synthesis of ALL 7 pillars working together. Selling separately would be like selling just one chapter of a book - you wouldn't have the complete story.

items.question: What makes the Essence Code different from a common report?
items.answer: Most tests generate descriptive reports: 'You are type X because you did Y'. The Essence Code is different. It doesn't just describe - it connects patterns, reveals contradictions, shows where you block yourself and where your real potential is. Nello (our AI guide) organizes your 7 maps, identifies the relationships between them and delivers a synthesis you can actually use in real life. It's like having a mentor who read everything about you and finally shows you the complete map.

items.question: Do I receive the Essence Code right at the beginning?
items.answer: No. The Essence Code is the final result of the Journey. You go through the 7 stages (Awaken, Recognize, Deepen, Connect, Integrate, Clarify and Live), and at the end, you receive your Essence Code in a complete PDF report. This is intentional - the discovery process is as important as the result. If you received everything ready at the beginning, you would lose the transformation that happens along the way.

items.question: Why is the Identity Journey paid, if there are free tests on the internet?
items.answer: There are free tests, but they are fragmented. You take an Enneagram here, a DISC there, and you're left with 7 pieces of a puzzle you can't put together. The Identity Journey integrates all of this into a coherent process. Plus, you have Nello as your guide - an AI that organizes your results, connects the patterns and helps you apply in real life. This has value. You're not paying for the maps - you're paying for the synthesis, the organization and the transformation.

items.question: How will I use this in practice afterwards?
items.answer: You receive a final integrated report with reflective guidance and paths for personal application. Many people use it for decision clarity, self-knowledge and deeper conversations, including in professional contexts, always without clinical character.

items.question: How long will I have access to my results?
items.answer: Lifetime access. Once you complete the Identity Journey, your results are saved in your account forever. You can revisit your Essence Code as many times as you want, at any time. There is no recurring subscription, no expiration. It's yours for life.

items.question: Is the payment secure? What if I don't identify with the content?
items.answer: Yes, the payment is 100% secure. We use Stripe, the world's most trusted payment platform. All your data is encrypted. If for any reason you don't identify with the content or are not satisfied, you have 7 days to request a full refund. No questions asked. We want you to be sure you're making the right choice.

pillars.title: Understand the 7 Pillars
pillars.subtitle: Deepen your knowledge about each layer of the Identity Journey

items.title: The 9 Enneagram Types
items.description: Discover which of the 9 personality types you are. The Enneagram reveals how you react emotionally, your fears, desires and how you behave under pressure.

items.title: Your DISC Profile
items.description: Understand how you make decisions. DISC reveals if you are Dominant, Influential, Steady or Conscientious. Each profile has unique strengths and challenges.

items.title: The 4 Temperaments
items.description: Identify your natural temperament (Sanguine, Choleric, Melancholic or Phlegmatic). Each has different motivations and blocks.

items.title: Your Natural Intelligences
items.description: You have talents you may have never recognized. The 8 multiple intelligences reveal where your natural strengths are.

items.title: The 16 Maturity Patterns
items.description: Some patterns in you ask for maturity. Nello 16 identifies exactly which ones and how to work on them.

items.title: Your Unconscious Archetypes
items.description: There are universal archetypal patterns that live in you. Discover which ones and how they influence your choices.

items.title: How You Connect
items.description: Each person has a unique style of connecting affectively with others. Know yours and improve your relationships.
